title: Minimum time taken to burn the BT from a given Node

content.problemStatement:
Given a target node data and a root of binary tree. If the target is set on fire, determine the shortest amount of time needed to burn the entire binary tree.
It is known that in 1 second all nodes connected to a given node get burned. That is its left child, right child, and parent.
constraints: 1 <= Number of nodes in the binary tree <= 10^5
content.inputFormat: The input will contain a binary tree and a target node value. The binary tree will be represented as a series of node values, and the target node value will be an integer.
content.outputFormat: The output will be the minimum time required to burn the entire binary tree from the target node.

solution.approach: To solve this problem, we can use a breadth-first search (BFS) algorithm to traverse the binary tree and calculate the minimum time required to burn the entire tree from the target node.
